---
title: "About"
page-layout: custom
---

```{=html}

<!-- HERO -->
<section style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a001a 0%,#3d0040 50%,#88398A 100%);padding:5rem 1.5rem 4rem;text-align:center;">
  <div style="max-width:750px;margin:0 auto;">
    <span style="display:inline-block;background:rgba(244,162,97,.2);border:1px solid rgba(244,162,97,.5);color:#F4A261;font-size:.75rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:.4rem 1rem;border-radius:100px;margin-bottom:1.25rem;">Community · Diversity · R</span>
    <h1 style="color:white;font-family:'Fraunces',serif;font-size:clamp(2rem,5vw,3.5rem);font-weight:900;margin-bottom:1rem;">A Global Movement,<br>A Local Community</h1>
    <p style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.78);font-size:1.05rem;line-height:1.8;max-width:620px;margin:0 auto 2rem;">R-Ladies is a worldwide network promoting gender diversity in the R community — and Abuja is proudly part of it.</p>
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="about-global.html" style="background:#F4A261;color:#1a001a;padding:.65rem 1.5rem;border-radius:8px;font-weight:800;font-size:.9rem;text-decoration:none;">🌍 R-Ladies Global</a>
      <a href="about-abuja.html" style="background:white;color:#3d0040;padding:.65rem 1.5rem;border-radius:8px;font-weight:800;font-size:.9rem;text-decoration:none;">🇳🇬 R-Ladies Abuja</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- WORLD MAP -->
<section style="background:#0d0820;padding:2rem 0 0;">
  <p style="text-align:center;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;margin:0 0 12px;font-family:sans-serif;">R-Ladies Chapters Worldwide</p>
  <div id="map-wrap" style="width:100%;"></div>
  <div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:2rem;padding:10px 1rem;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);">
    <div style="text-align:center;font-family:sans-serif;"><div style="color:#88398A;font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:900;line-height:1;">219</div><div style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);font-size:.65rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;margin-top:2px;">Chapters</div></div>
    <div style="text-align:center;font-family:sans-serif;"><div style="color:#88398A;font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:900;line-height:1;">63</div><div style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);font-size:.65rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;margin-top:2px;">Countries</div></div>
    <div style="text-align:center;font-family:sans-serif;"><div style="color:#88398A;font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:900;line-height:1;">100K+</div><div style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);font-size:.65rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;margin-top:2px;">Members</div></div>
    <div style="text-align:center;font-family:sans-serif;"><div style="color:#88398A;font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:900;line-height:1;">3,943+</div><div style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);font-size:.65rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;margin-top:2px;">Events</div></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- TWO CARDS -->
<section style="padding:4rem 1.5rem;background:#fdf8fe;">
  <div style="max-width:900px;margin:0 auto;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:2rem;">
    <a href="about-global.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
      <div style="background:white;border-radius:16px;padding:2rem;border:1px solid #f0e0f1;height:100%;" onmouseover="this.style.boxShadow='0 8px 32px rgba(136,57,138,.15)'" onmouseout="this.style.boxShadow='none'">
        <div style="font-size:2.5rem;margin-bottom:1rem;">🌍</div>
        <h2 style="font-family:'Fraunces',serif;color:#3d0040;font-size:1.4rem;margin-bottom:.75rem;">R-Ladies Global</h2>
        <p style="font-size:.9rem;color:#666;line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:1.25rem;">Learn about the worldwide organisation — its founding story, mission, 219 chapters across 63 countries, and the resources it offers every member.</p>
        <span style="color:#88398A;font-weight:700;font-size:.88rem;">Read more →</span>
      </div>
    </a>
    <a href="about-abuja.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
      <div style="background:white;border-radius:16px;padding:2rem;border:1px solid #f0e0f1;height:100%;" onmouseover="this.style.boxShadow='0 8px 32px rgba(136,57,138,.15)'" onmouseout="this.style.boxShadow='none'">
        <div style="font-size:2.5rem;margin-bottom:1rem;">🇳🇬</div>
        <h2 style="font-family:'Fraunces',serif;color:#3d0040;font-size:1.4rem;margin-bottom:.75rem;">R-Ladies Abuja</h2>
        <p style="font-size:.9rem;color:#666;line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:1.25rem;">Meet your local chapter — founded in 2021, 34+ events hosted, and a growing community of R users, data scientists, and learners across Nigeria.</p>
        <span style="color:#88398A;font-weight:700;font-size:.88rem;">Read more →</span>
      </div>
    </a>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="flag-stripe"></div>

<style>
@keyframes pulse1{0%{r:7;opacity:.8}100%{r:24;opacity:0}}
@keyframes pulse2{0%{r:7;opacity:.4}100%{r:32;opacity:0}}
.pr1{animation:pulse1 2s ease-out infinite}
.pr2{animation:pulse2 2.5s ease-out infinite .6s}
</style>

<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/d3/7.8.5/d3.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/topojson/3.0.2/topojson.min.js"></script>
<script>
(function(){

  const CHAPTERS = [
    [-87.63,41.85],[-73.94,40.67],[-122.42,37.77],[-118.24,34.05],[-77.04,38.91],
    [-71.06,42.36],[-104.99,39.74],[-95.37,29.76],[-112.07,33.45],[-93.27,44.98],
    [-122.33,47.61],[-83.05,42.33],[-90.07,29.95],[-80.19,25.76],[-84.39,33.75],
    [-96.8,32.79],[-86.15,39.77],[-117.16,32.72],[-111.89,40.76],[-81.38,28.54],
    [-123.12,49.28],[-114.07,51.05],[-73.57,45.5],[-75.7,45.42],
    [-99.13,19.43],[-84.09,9.93],[-90.52,14.63],[-66.9,10.48],
    [-46.63,-23.55],[-43.17,-22.9],[-51.23,-30.03],[-70.67,-33.45],
    [-58.38,-34.61],[-74.08,-4.64],[-57.52,-25.29],[-77.03,-12.04],
    [-68.15,-16.5],[-56.17,-34.9],[-47.93,-15.78],[-38.52,-12.97],
    [-49.27,-25.43],[-63.18,-17.78],[-35.74,-9.67],
    [-0.13,51.51],[2.35,48.85],[13.41,52.52],[12.49,41.89],[2.17,41.39],
    [18.07,59.33],[4.9,52.37],[14.42,50.09],[17.03,51.11],[21.02,52.23],
    [23.72,37.98],[26.1,44.44],[19.08,47.5],[16.37,48.21],[9.19,47.38],
    [-3.7,40.42],[10.75,59.91],[12.57,55.68],[25.28,54.69],[24.75,59.44],
    [-8.61,41.15],[28.95,41.01],[30.52,50.45],[44.83,41.69],[37.62,55.75],
    [-6.27,53.33],[-4.25,55.86],[6.14,46.21],[15.97,45.82],[14.51,46.05],
    [23.32,42.7],[18.42,43.85],[21.43,41.99],
    [3.39,6.45],[7.49,9.06],[36.82,-1.29],[32.58,0.31],[18.56,-33.93],
    [28.05,-26.32],[31.24,30.06],[2.35,6.37],[-17.44,14.69],[7.99,12.36],
    [38.74,9.03],[15.31,4.36],[-1.55,12.36],[39.18,-6.17],
    [29.37,-3.39],[30.06,-1.94],
    [34.85,31.05],[51.39,35.69],[67.09,24.86],[77.21,28.63],[72.88,19.08],
    [80.27,13.08],[85.32,27.72],[103.82,1.35],[121.57,25.04],[126.98,37.57],
    [139.69,35.69],[144.96,-37.81],[151.21,-33.87],[174.77,-36.85],
    [115.86,-31.95],[153.02,-27.47],[138.6,-34.93],[145.07,-37.82],
    [172.64,-43.53],[106.83,-6.21],[100.52,13.75],[120.98,14.6]
  ];

  function drawMap(geo) {
    const wrap = document.getElementById("map-wrap");
    const W = wrap.offsetWidth || 900;
    const H = Math.round(W * 0.5);

    const svg = d3.select("#map-wrap").append("svg")
      .attr("viewBox","0 0 "+W+" "+H)
      .attr("width","100%")
      .style("display","block")
      .style("background","#0d0820");

    const proj = d3.geoNaturalEarth1()
      .scale(W / 6.3)
      .translate([W/2, H/2]);

    const pathGen = d3.geoPath().projection(proj);

    // Sphere
    svg.append("path").datum({type:"Sphere"})
      .attr("d", pathGen)
      .attr("fill","#0a0518")
      .attr("stroke","rgba(255,255,255,0.1)")
      .attr("stroke-width",0.8);

    // Graticule
    svg.append("path").datum(d3.geoGraticule()())
      .attr("d", pathGen)
      .attr("fill","none")
      .attr("stroke","rgba(255,255,255,0.05)")
      .attr("stroke-width",0.4);

    // Countries
    svg.append("g").selectAll("path")
      .data(geo.features)
      .join("path")
      .attr("d", pathGen)
      .attr("fill","#4a1875")
      .attr("stroke","#1a0030")
      .attr("stroke-width",0.5);

    // Chapter dots
    CHAPTERS.forEach(([lon,lat]) => {
      const [x,y] = proj([lon,lat]);
      svg.append("circle")
        .attr("cx",x).attr("cy",y).attr("r",2.8)
        .attr("fill","rgba(232,197,232,0.8)")
        .attr("stroke","rgba(255,255,255,0.3)")
        .attr("stroke-width",0.4);
    });

    // Abuja marker
    const [ax,ay] = proj([7.49, 9.06]);
    const g = svg.append("g");
    g.append("circle").attr("class","pr2").attr("cx",ax).attr("cy",ay).attr("r",7).attr("fill","#F4A261");
    g.append("circle").attr("class","pr1").attr("cx",ax).attr("cy",ay).attr("r",7).attr("fill","#F4A261");
    g.append("circle").attr("cx",ax).attr("cy",ay).attr("r",7).attr("fill","#F4A261").attr("stroke","white").attr("stroke-width",2);
    const lx=ax+12, ly=ay-24;
    g.append("line").attr("x1",ax).attr("y1",ay-7).attr("x2",lx).attr("y2",ly+10)
      .attr("stroke","#F4A261").attr("stroke-width",1).attr("stroke-dasharray","3,2");
    g.append("rect").attr("x",lx).attr("y",ly-13).attr("width",112).attr("height",19).attr("rx",9).attr("fill","#F4A261");
    g.append("text").attr("x",lx+56).attr("y",ly-1)
      .attr("text-anchor","middle").attr("font-family","sans-serif")
      .attr("font-size","10").attr("font-weight","700").attr("fill","#1a001a")
      .text("Abuja, Nigeria");
  }

  // Load local file — you must place countries-110m.json in your data/ folder
  fetch("data/countries-110m.json")
    .then(r => { if(!r.ok) throw new Error(); return r.json(); })
    .then(topo => {
      const geo = topojson.feature(topo, topo.objects.countries);
      drawMap(geo);
    })
    .catch(() => {
      document.getElementById("map-wrap").innerHTML =
        "<p style='color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);text-align:center;padding:3rem;font-family:sans-serif;font-size:.85rem;'>Place <code>countries-110m.json</code> in your <code>data/</code> folder to display the map.</p>";
    });

})();
</script>
```
